subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-18 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Should one ponder carefully, one would realize how important it is to give children a spiritual education from their earliest years.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر انسان خوب تأمل کند مییابد که تربیت روحانی اطفال از صغر سن چه قدر اهمیت دارد
